title: Panorama Liberation War Museum
description: Feasibility study and detail design for the Panorama Liberation War Museum near Padma Bridge, including sub-soil investigation, river morphological study, environmental and social safeguard management plan, and tender document preparation.

title: Manikganj Int. Cricket Stadium
description: Comprehensive feasibility study, architectural design, master plan, structural design, MEP design, hydro-morphological study, river bank protection, BOQ & cost estimation, and DPP preparation for an international cricket stadium complex.

title: Sheikh Russel Water Base Park
description: Detail survey, sub-soil investigation with geological assessment, hydro-morphological study, and Environmental & Social Impact Assessment for a modern recreational water-based park in Ghatarchar area, Keraniganj.

title: 200MWac Solar Power Plant
description: Prefeasibility study including site buildability assessment, climate investigation, potential site development works, accessibility assessment, survey and data analysis for a large-scale solar power plant at Dhulaswar Mouza.

title: 10-Storied Male Student Hostel
description: Architecture, structural design, plumbing, electro/mechanical design, 3D drawing, cost estimation, and tender document preparation for a 10-storied male student hostel at SUST.

title: 400kV Transmission Line IEE
description: Preparation of Initial Environmental Examination (IEE) for 400kV transmission line from New Madunaghat Substation to Maheshkhali via Banshkhali, including baseline data, stakeholder consultation, national policy compliance, and ECC submission.

title: 5-Storied Academic Building
description: Topographic survey, sub-soil investigation, architectural drawings, structural design, plumbing & MEP design, 3D drawing, cost estimation, and tender document preparation for a 5-storied academic building.

title: PGCB Grid Substation Office Building
description: Detail architecture, structural & MEP design for a store-cum-office building at Kaliakair 400/230/132 kV Grid Substation, including survey, 3D drawings, cost estimation, tender documents, and DPP submission.

title: Central Mosque at SUST
description: Architectural drawings, structural design, plumbing & electro-mechanical design, 3D drawing, cost estimation, and tender document evaluation for the central mosque at SUST.

title: 10-Storied Teacher's Quarter
description: Complete architectural, structural, plumbing, and MEP design including 3D drawings, cost estimation, and tender documents for a 10-storied teacher's quarter.

title: 4 Nos. 10-Storied Officers' Quarter
description: Architecture, structural design, plumbing, electro/mechanical design, 3D drawing, cost estimation, and tender evaluation for four 10-storied officers' quarter buildings at SUST.

title: Muktijoddha Chattor, Sylhet
description: Architectural drawings, structural design, electro/mechanical design & drawing, 3D design, cost estimation, and tender document evaluation for Muktijoddha Chattor memorial.

title: 100MWac Solar Power Plant
description: Feasibility study and preliminary route survey for 132 kV transmission line, drone survey, sub-soil investigation, mouza map digitization, and prefeasibility report for a proposed 100 MWac solar power plant.

title: Dhamrai 50MW Solar Power Plant
description: Feasibility study and site assessment including topographic survey, geological investigation, drone survey, boundary demarcation, mouza map digitization, and initial environmental and social impact assessment for ib-Vogt GmbH, Germany.

title: Sonagazi 50MW Solar Power Plant
description: Site assessment, topographic survey, geological investigation, drone survey, boundary demarcation, and initial environmental and social impact assessment for a 50MW solar power plant.

title: 307MW Coal-Fired Power Plant IEE
description: Preparation of Initial Environmental Examination (IEE) for transmission line, including environmental baseline data, stakeholder consultation, impact assessment, mitigation measures, and ECC submission to DoE.

title: Marine Drive Road Widening EIA
description: Transportation demand forecast modeling and comprehensive EIA study for the Cox's Bazar–Teknaf Marine Drive road widening (23 km) and realignment (6 km) project, covering primary/secondary baseline data, public consultation, and environmental management plan.

title: Kalshi Flyover Feasibility Study
description: Traffic modeling and feasibility study for the proposed Kalshi Flyover from ECB Chattar to Mirpur DOHS Gate-1, spanning 3.70 km road section with 2.815 km flyover, 77 pier columns, 260 PC girders, and box girder spans.

title: Dormitory cum Church Building
description: Architectural drawings, structural design, plumbing, electro/mechanical design, 3D drawing, and cost estimation for a two-storied dormitory cum church building at BBCF Prayer Garden.

title: Nazrul Islam University Shaheed Minar
client: Jatiyo Kobi Kazi Nazrul Islam University
description: Architectural drawings, structural design, electro/mechanical design, 3D drawing, and cost estimation for the Shaheed Minar at Jatiyo Kobi Kazi Nazrul Islam University.

title: 200MWac Solar – Bheramara
description: Project site assessment and transmission line route survey including topographic survey, geological assessment, drone survey, boundary demarcation, and prefeasibility report for a 200MWac solar power plant in Bheramara Upazila.
